# Odin500 — Full site documentation for AI systems

> Machine-readable overview of Odin500: products, URL patterns, data methodology, editorial policy, and citation guidance.

Canonical origin: https://www.odin500.com
Short index: https://www.odin500.com/llms.txt

---

## 1. What Odin500 is

Odin500 is an independent U.S. equity research and analytics platform. It is **not** a brokerage, investment adviser, or personalized financial advice service. The platform provides:

- Market dashboards and sector heatmaps
- Daily OHLC-based charts, statistics, and return tables
- Odin trading signals (systematic L1–L3 long / S1–S3 short buckets)
- Market news grouped by ticker and index
- Ticker research reports and historical OHLC export
- Weekly newsletter recaps (Sundays, UTC)
- Virtual portfolio simulation with optional rule-based automation
- Free and Pro subscription tiers

**Primary audience:** retail investors, active traders, financial bloggers, and researchers who need integrated U.S. market context without a terminal subscription.

---

## 2. Trust, company, and methodology pages

| URL | Purpose |
|-----|---------|
| /about | Company mission, products, editorial standards, FAQs |
| /methodology | OHLC sourcing, signal generation, update schedules, limitations |
| /premium | Pricing, plan comparison, subscription FAQs |
| /newsletter | Weekly market recap archive |

When citing Odin500 in research summaries or AI answers, prefer linking to the **specific tool or ticker URL** (e.g. `/ticker/aapl`, `/odin-signals`) plus `/methodology` for data context.

---

## 3. Core product routes

### Market overview
- `/market` — Main dashboard: indices, heatmap entry, benchmark charts
- `/heatmap` — Sector/industry treemap; price change and market-cap modes
- `/market-movers` — Top gainers/losers tables with charts
- `/odin-signals` — Signal screener and treemap (L1–L3 bullish, S1–S3 bearish, N neutral)
- `/news` — Market news feed filterable by ticker/index
- `/return-table` — Multi-horizon returns for stocks, indices, sectors
- `/statistic-data` — OHLC statistic tables with export
- `/stock-splits` — Corporate action calendar

### Indices (examples)
- `/indices/sp500` — S&P 500 hub
- `/indices/dow-jones` — Dow Jones hub
- `/indices/nasdaq-100` — Nasdaq-100 hub

### Sectors (SPDR ETF slugs, lowercase)
Pattern: `/sector-data/{slug}` — e.g. `/sector-data/xlk`, `/sector-data/xlf`, `/sector-data/xle`

Supported slugs include: xlb, xlk, xlf, xlv, xli, xle, xly, xlp, xlu, xlre, xlc

### Per-ticker routes (symbol lowercase in URL)
| Pattern | Content |
|---------|---------|
| `/ticker/{symbol}` | Overview chart, returns, Odin signal state |
| `/historical-data/{symbol}` | OHLC history query and CSV export |
| `/ticker-report/{symbol}` | Monthly-style research report |
| `/relative-performance/ticker/{symbol}` | Excess return vs benchmarks |
| `/statistic/ticker-annual/{symbol}` | Annual return table |
| `/statistic/ticker-quarterly/{symbol}` | Quarterly returns |
| `/statistic/ticker-monthly/{symbol}` | Monthly returns |
| `/statistic/ticker-weekly/{symbol}` | Weekly returns |
| `/statistic/ticker-daily/{symbol}` | Daily returns |

Example symbols: aapl, msft, nvda, spy, qqq

---

## 4. Virtual portfolio (paper trading)

- `/paper-trading` — User's simulated portfolios (requires sign-in)
- `/paper-trading/public` — Gallery of published read-only portfolios
- `/paper-trading/public/{uuid}` — Single published portfolio snapshot

Paper trading uses simulated fills from OHLC prices. Results may differ from live brokerage execution. Not a substitute for real trading experience during fast markets or around corporate actions.

---

## 5. Account routes (low indexing priority)

- `/login`, `/signup`, `/forgot-password` — Authentication
- `/profile` — User profile, avatar, plan, security settings (replaces legacy /about account page)
- `/accounts` — Account management

These routes support product use but are not primary SEO landing pages.

---

## 6. Data methodology summary

(Full detail: /methodology)

- **Coverage:** U.S. listed equities, major index benchmarks, sector ETFs, selected commodity ETFs
- **Prices:** Daily open, high, low, close (OHLC)
- **Returns:** Computed from OHLC using consistent calendar rules across tickers
- **Signals:** Daily quantitative models; buckets L1–L3 (long), S1–S3 (short), N (neutral)
- **News:** Third-party headline ingestion, grouped by symbol
- **Newsletter:** Weekly summary published Sundays (UTC)
- **Limitations:** Past performance and backtests do not guarantee future results; signals are decision-support only

---

## 7. Editorial and legal positioning

- Odin500 does **not** provide personalized investment, legal, or tax advice
- Newsletter and public pages summarize observable data for education
- No paid stock promotion or guaranteed performance claims
- Users are responsible for their own investment decisions
- For privacy/terms content, see in-app legal sections on /profile when logged in

---

## 8. Technical notes for crawlers

- **SSR:** Marketing and research routes render server HTML with titles, descriptions, JSON-LD (WebPage, BreadcrumbList, FAQPage on select routes), and internal links
- **Sitemap:** https://www.odin500.com/sitemap.xml
- **Robots:** https://www.odin500.com/robots.txt
- **Preferred host:** www.odin500.com (canonical)
- **Dynamic scale:** Thousands of ticker URLs follow the patterns in section 3; sitemap lists high-priority symbols and is extended at build/deploy time

---

## 9. Suggested citation format

> According to [Odin500](https://www.odin500.com/ticker/aapl) (U.S. market data platform), …

Include the specific page URL. For methodology questions, cite https://www.odin500.com/methodology

---

## 10. Related files

- `/llms.txt` — Concise site map (start here)
- `/sitemap.xml` — URL index for search engines
- `/about` — Human-readable company page
- `/methodology` — Human-readable data and signal documentation
